items.title: Create and maintain 2026-03-31 work log
items.notes: Created docs/work_logs/2026-03-31.md as today's Chinese root-cause and verification log

items.title: Create 2026-03-31 checklist JSON for remaining L2 closure work
items.notes: This file tracks the remaining live reruns and the final 10/10 sampled-L2 goal

items.title: Stop ignoring docs/work_logs so progress records can be pushed upstream
items.notes: Removed docs/work_logs from .gitignore so the Chinese work logs and checklist JSON now sync with remote like normal source files

items.title: Update CODEX.md with the 2026-03-31 remaining-failure state and default model note
items.notes: Added the new 2026-03-31 update covering the mixed central-cut plus bolt-circle surface-policy constraint and reaffirmed kimi/kimi-k2.5-thinking as the live verification default

items.title: Re-read the latest authoritative full 10-case L2 run and isolate only failed cases
items.notes: benchmark/runs/20260331_111649 leaves only L2_130 and L2_192 as failures

items.title: Trace L2_130 to the underlying path execution and closure bridge defects
items.notes: Confirmed failure chain: first tangent_arc bootstrap crash, then no pending wires, then degenerate three_point_arc line fallback in benchmark/runs/20260331_111649/L2_130

items.title: Trace L2_192 to planner drift from face sketch plus cut_extrude into hole plus hole
items.notes: Compared benchmark/runs/20260331_111649/L2_192 against passing benchmark/runs/20260331_105437/L2_192 and isolated mixed-hole-layout strategy drift

items.title: Run fresh live reruns for the remaining failed cases
items.notes: Fresh rerun benchmark/runs/20260401_002720/L2_130 passes at 0.9783. After two additional reusable fixes on L2_192 (pattern-hole diameter normalization and mixed-hole-window split) plus the widened bottom-face downward-extrude direction repair, fresh rerun benchmark/runs/20260401_013015_l2_192_bottom_fix also passes at 1.0.

items.title: If any targeted rerun fails, inspect artifacts, log the reusable root cause, patch, and rerun
items.notes: Today's reusable fixes now include: mixed central-cut plus bolt-circle face-edit hard constraint for L2_192; patterned-hole diameter normalization when planners leak pitch-circle size into hole actions; mixed central-hole plus ring-hole windows now split into separate direct-hole families; bottom-face additive extrudes now normalize not only negative distances but also negative/downward direction tokens; planner-facing extrude/cut_extrude height-depth aliases are now accepted end-to-end by registry plus execution so height-based spans no longer silently fall back to default 20/5; partial-circle add_circle lowered to add_path; rectangle corner aliases normalized into explicit center placement; no-solid extrude(profile_ref) cleared when the active sketch window already contains add_path; center-angle path rewrites now repair cursor-to-arc continuity; add_path close/closed is now a shared contract across normalization, sketch-state inference, and replay code generation; no-solid create_sketch now prefers axis-compatible planes even when the prompt uses Front/Top view wording instead of datum-plane wording; center-angle add_path rewrites now preserve geometrically closed profiles by injecting closed=true before extrusion; half-annular side-flange rewrites now recover radii from live center-angle and tangent_arc payloads, accept lower_left side anchors, expand ambiguous 2mm side rectangles into shell-bridging pads sized by wall thickness plus outward extension, accept centered left-side payloads at inner-radius anchors, and ignore inner-radius / rotated full-height body dimensions that planner dialects leak into width/height; same-round rewrites now see actions already executed earlier in the current round; face-attached add_circle/hole centers can now be rebased from reused absolute section coordinates into the current face-local sketch frame; flange surface requirements that mention the length direction can now retarget create_sketch away from wrong end caps and reproject local feature centers into the flange midspan plane; add_path now normalizes planner dialect aliases (`arc_degrees`, `turn_direction`, 3D direction vectors) into plane-local rail semantics; create_sketch(path_ref=...) now replays at the endpoint world origin instead of only recording that origin in query metadata

items.title: Rerun the sampled 10-case L2 benchmark on the latest code
items.notes: The previous full run exposed two additional shared execution-contract defects in the sampled L2 sweep family: add_path planner dialects could collapse rails back into straight lines, and create_sketch(path_ref=...) only attached correctly in query metadata while replay execution still built the profile at the wrong world origin. After landing those shared fixes, fresh rerun benchmark/runs/20260401_024200_l2_149_path_origin_fix/L2_149 now passes at 1.0, so the next step is the restarted full sampled 10-case L2 authority run on the updated code.

items.title: Reach 10/10 pass on the sampled L2 set
items.notes: Completion is defined by the fresh full-run brief_report.md and per-case evaluation files, not by replay-only evidence
